disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The scalp under the patches is smooth and normal — no scaling, pustules, crusting or redness
trigger_question_examples: What does the skin look like where the hair has gone — smooth, or scaly/crusty/red?
Any flaking, pus, or crusting on the bald patches?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin is completely smooth and normal-looking — no flakes, no crusts, no redness.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't know, I'm too panicked to look properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Short broken hairs tapering at the base at the edges of the patches
trigger_question_examples: At the edges of the patches, are there short broken hairs?
Are the hairs at the border thinner at the base?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, at the edges there are short broken little hairs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute panic with hyperventilation; screen for thoughts of self-harm
trigger_question_examples: This is really distressing — are you having any thoughts of harming yourself?
Do you feel safe on your own tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No thoughts of harming myself — I'm just overwhelmed and frightened and I feel very alone.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I just can't cope with going bald.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Personal history of autoimmune thyroid disease
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any autoimmune conditions, like a thyroid problem?
Any thyroid or other immune conditions in you or your family?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I have an autoimmune thyroid condition and take levothyroxine.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is my hair going to be gone forever? Can you give me something to calm me down right now?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: De-escalate with calm reassurance about the typically non-scarring, reversible nature once the pattern is established; screen for self-harm/panic severity; guide non-pharmacological panic management and urgent support. Should NOT newly prescribe a benzodiazepine remotely, nor dismiss the distress.
